Title: Embedded Malicious Code with vendored remote access trojan
Description: Multiple versions of the npm package `@shadanai/openclaw` contain vendored malicious code related to the axios supply chain attack of March 31, 2026. These versions were published with embedded malware that deploys a cross-platform remote access trojan. The package should be considered entirely malicious and removed from any system where it was installed.
Solution: Remove the package entirely. This package is malware and has no legitimate use. Treat affected systems as fully compromised and rotate all credentials.
